results.title: First Made-In-India C295 Aircraft To Be Delivered To IAF In September 2026
results.description: The first Made-in-India Airbus C295 military transport aircraft is officially scheduled for delivery to the Indian Air Force in September 2026. The aircraft was assembled at the TATA Advanced Systems Limited facility in Vadodara, Gujarat, and successfully completed its maiden test flight on 10 June 2026. This achievement marks a significant milestone in India’s aerospace and defence

results.title: Sky To Sea Strike: India Only Country In Asia Capable of Airborne RHIB ‘Duck Drop’ Tactic
results.description: India remains the only Asian nation to have officially demonstrated and deployed the airborne insertion of Special Operations RHIBs, a tactic known as the “duck drop”, with elite forces like the Garud Commando Force and Para (SF) parachuting military boats from heavy-lift aircraft such as the C-130J Super Hercules into water bodies for covert infiltration.This capability has been validated in

results.description: New Delhi, July 20 (SocialNews.XYZ) Gold and silver prices traded higher on Monday, supported by value buying after the US dollar eased slightly, although elevated crude oil prices kept investors cautious amid expectations of another... results.title: Market wrap: Trent, Axis Bank among top gainers and losers on Nifty and Sensex today
results.description: Indian equities ended lower as escalating Iran-US tensions and surging crude prices dampened investor sentiment despite easing volatility. Banking stocks dragged benchmarks, while analysts expect geopolitical risks, inflation concerns and Q1 earnings momentum to shape market direction, with Nifty support at 24,100 and resistance near 24,400.

results.title: Uday Krishna Reddy
results.description: ట్రైనీ ఐపీఎస్ ఉదయ్ కృష్ణారెడ్డి ఆత్మహత్యకు యత్నించారు. పరిస్థితి విషమంగా ఉండటంతో ఆయనను ఆస్పత్రికి తరలించారు.
